welcomeMessage: Your payment was successful. Upload your Trading212 statement to get started.
title: Upload Broker Statement
subtitle: Upload your Trading212 annual statement (PDF) or transaction export (CSV).
supportedFormats: Supports: Trading212 Annual Statement (.pdf) or CSV export (.csv)
csvNoData: CSV file has no data rows.
invalidFileType: Please upload a CSV or PDF file.
rowsSkipped: {{count}} rows skipped (deposits, withdrawals, or unknown actions)
rateAutoFetched: Rate auto-fetched from {{source}}. You can override it above.
enterManualRate: Enter the average BNR exchange rate for {{year}}.
yearUnsupportedNote: We don't calculate tax year {{year}} yet. For this year, file your Declaratia Unica manually using that year's form.
usingTaxRules: Using {{country}} tax rules ({{rate}}% capital gains rate)
bnrRateFallback: Could not fetch BNR rates. Using broker rates as fallback.
bnrRatePartial: BNR rates applied for {{ok}}. For {{failed}}, the broker rate was used (BNR unavailable).
recommendedPdf: Recommended: Upload your annual statement (PDF) for most accurate results.
csvFullHistoryNote: For CSV: export your full Trading212 history (from account opening), not just the tax year.
csvMissingHistoryWarning: This CSV is missing historical buy transactions. You are selling shares that were not purchased in this CSV. The cost basis will be wrong and your tax calculation will be incorrect.
csvHistoryBlockAction: Please re-export your full Trading212 history from account opening through Dec 31 of the tax year, or use the PDF annual statement instead.
csvHistoryBlockActionIbkr: Re-export an IBKR Activity Statement that covers your full account history (every year since your first buy), not just the tax year, so it includes the buy transactions.
csvHistoryBlockActionRevolut: Re-export a Revolut Account Statement with the period set to All time, so it includes your full buy history, not just the tax year.
csvSplitWarningTitle: Stock splits: common ones are handled, rare ones are not
csvSplitWarningBody: Trading212 CSV exports do not include split events, so InvesTax auto-adjusts cost basis for well-known forward splits (NVDA, TSLA, AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL/GOOG). A less common split that we do not track yet would still produce an incorrect cost basis.
csvSplitWarningAction: If you held a stock through a split we do not list, double-check that position or use the PDF annual statement, which already accounts for every split.
csvSplitsApplied: Adjusted cost basis for known stock split(s): {{splits}}.
csvHint: Upload your full Trading212 transaction history (.csv)
csvPreWarning: Common stock splits (NVDA, TSLA, etc.) are adjusted automatically. For rarer splits, the PDF tab is the safest option.
taxRulesUpdated: Tax rules current as of January 2026
csvBrokerLabel: Which broker is this CSV from?
ibkrBetaPreWarning: Interactive Brokers support is in beta. We built it from IBKR's published export format, so check the numbers against your statement before you file.
ibkrCsvHint: Upload your IBKR Activity Statement export (.csv).
ibkrFullHistoryNote: Export your full account history (from account opening), not just the tax year, so cost basis is correct.
ibkrBetaNoteBody: This parser is new and built without a real IBKR account to test against. Double-check the numbers against your Activity Statement before filing.
revolutBetaPreWarning: Revolut support is in beta. We built it from Revolut's published Account Statement format, so check the numbers against your statement before you file.
revolutFullHistoryNote: Export the full history (period: All time), not just the tax year, so cost basis is correct.
revolutBetaNoteBody: This parser is new and built without a real Revolut account to test against. Revolut statements do not itemise dividend withholding tax, so double-check dividend tax and the totals against your statement before filing.
csvMultiFileHint: Tip: you can select several CSV files at once (e.g. one per year) and we'll merge them.
csvDuplicatesRemoved: {{count}} duplicate transactions removed across overlapping files
previewSubtitle: See whether we can read your statement before you pay. The file check is free; the numbers are on the paid plan.
pdfBrokerMismatchTitle: This does not look like a Trading 212 statement
pdfBrokerMismatchBody: We could not find the sections of a Trading 212 annual statement in this PDF. If you use Interactive Brokers, export the CSV (Activity Statement) and upload it under the CSV section above. Via PDF, InvesTax only reads Trading 212 statements.
previewVerdictGreen: We can process this statement. Unlock your numbers.
previewVerdictAmber: Check the warnings below before you pay.
previewVerdictRed: This statement cannot be calculated correctly right now.
previewBrokerBeta: {{broker}}: support is in beta. Check the numbers against your statement before filing.
previewYearUnsupported: We do not calculate {{year}} yet, and it is not on the roadmap.
previewUnlockTitle: Your statement is ready to process
previewUnlockBody: The file check was free. The full numbers and Declaratia Unica values are on the paid plan.
previewBlockedBody: We cannot process this statement correctly right now. Tell us which broker or year you need and we'll get back to you.
previewBlockedCta: Tell us which broker/year you need
previewWaitlistBody: We'll email you when we add support for your case. No spam.
